---
title: "Vanessa Ragan"
subtitle: "Student | Computer Scientist| Applied Mathematician"
image: profile.jpeg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/AzureWings123
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vanessa-ragan-669422233/
---

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Education

Fullerton College \| Fullerton, CA \| August 2018 - May 2021

California State University, Fullerton \| Fullerton, CA \| August 2021 - present

## Experience

Thai Specialty \| Waitress \| August 2018 - present

Fullerton College \| Computer Science and Applied Mathematics Tutor \| August 2023 - present

DataAnnotation \| AI Trainer and Tester \| July 2025 - present
